task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Amateur' module has been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict window tabs or open modules. The 'Amateur' tab/module should no longer be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'New_York_Studio' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration dialog or map indicator showing 'New_York_Studio' with Latitude 40.7128 (N), Longitude -74.0060 (74.0060 W), and Altitude 10m.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Studio_Map' module with a Map-only layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new tab or module window named 'Studio_Map'. Its layout should consist entirely of a world map, with no satellite lists or polar views visible in that module.

task_completion.description: Verify that only the ISS (ZARYA) and HST are included in the 'Studio_Map' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the map inside the 'Studio_Map' module. Only two satellite icons/labels should be visible: ISS (ZARYA) and HST (Hubble Space Telescope).

task_completion.description: Verify that 'New_York_Studio' is the assigned ground station for the 'Studio_Map' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the module header, map display, or module settings for 'Studio_Map'. The active ground station should be listed or marked as 'New_York_Studio'.

task_completion.description: Verify the map visuals: Day/Night shadow ON, Map Grid OFF, Sun/Moon icons OFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the map in the 'Studio_Map' module. The shaded day/night overlay must be visible. There should be NO grid lines across the map, and the Sun and Moon icons must NOT be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict graphical user interface being used and modified, not just a text editor modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the UI changes are genuine and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application should look like a standard Linux desktop application (GTK/Qt) running GPredict, with consistent fonts and window borders.

integrity.description: Verify that the final state is actually applied and visible in the main UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the main GPredict window reflecting all the requested changes (the new map, correct satellites, correct visuals), rather than just showing open settings dialogs that were never saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: ISS (ZARYA) corresponds to NORAD ID 25544. Hubble Space Telescope (HST) corresponds to NORAD ID 20580. The New York ground station coordinates are exactly Latitude 40.7128 N, Longitude 74.0060 W (-74.0060), Altitude 10m. Map visual requirements: Grid = OFF, Sun = OFF, Moon = OFF, Day/Night Shadow = ON.
